completed: Secondary-path reuse of the shared helper was implemented.

A legacy alias regression was made explicit before the round closed.
pending: Repair the legacy alias regression before this maintenance chain resumes normal closure.

risks: If the regression is treated as minor noise, later rounds may accumulate hidden debt.

reopen_context.summary: Round 2 cannot be read as clean progress. The helper reuse works locally, but a previously stable behavior broke and the next round must start from that fact rather than from the implementation diff alone.
reopen_context.next_action: Start the next round from regression repair and widened validation, not from feature expansion.
